name: Spoon Bread Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine 1 garlic clove (fresh, pressed), 1 1/3 cups milk, 1 tablespoon butter or margarine, and 1/2 teaspoon salt; stir in 1 pinch nutmeg.
2. Gradually stir in 1/4 cup yellow cornmeal until combined.
3. Bring the mixture to a full boil over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until it thickens. Continue boiling for 1 minute after thickening.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. Beat the egg yolks lightly with a fork.
6. Stir a small amount of hot mixture into the yolks, then mix yolk mixture into the hot cornmeal.
7. Add 3/4 cup grated sharp cheddar cheese to the cornmeal mixture and stir until combined.
8. Beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until they form stiff peaks.
9. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cornmeal mixture using a spatula or wooden spoon, ensuring not to deflate the eggs too much.
